subject: Ecology
title: Biophilic Cities
description: A fast breakdown of Biophilic Cities for builders.

hook.text: A biophilic city designs nature into every layer—from balconies to building codes.

buildup.text: Biophilic design integrates plants, water, natural light, and wildlife habitat into structures.

discovery.text: Singapore's Supertree Grove and vertical gardens show how density and nature can coexist.

twist.text: Residents in biophilic buildings report better sleep, lower stress, and higher productivity.

climax.text: Biophilic planning treats nature not as decoration but as essential urban infrastructure.

punchline.text: Future cities will be built with nature, not despite it.

quiz.question: What defines a biophilic city?
options: Nature is integrated into every design layer
